mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_groups (ref_type, created_by) VALUES (#{refType}, #{createdBy}) RETURNING id, ref_type, created_at, created_by
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_group_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_url, mime_type, file_size, storage_type, sort_order, is_main_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM files WHERE file_group_id = #{fileGroupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, file_group_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_url, mime_type, file_size, storage_type, sort_order, is_main_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM files WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE files SET is_main_yn = 'N' WHERE file_group_id = #{fileGroupId} AND is_main_yn = 'Y' AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE files SET sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), is_main_yn = COALESCE(#{isMainYn}, is_main_yn), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, file_group_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_url, mime_type, file_size, storage_type, sort_order, is_main_yn, created_at, updated_at
